children.heading: Establishment of Fund
children.label: a Establishment of Fund
children.text: There is established in the Treasury of the United States a fund to be known as the National Health Service Corps Member Replacement Fund (hereafter in this section referred to as the “Fund”). The Fund shall consist of such amounts as may be appropriated under subsection (b) to the Fund. Amounts appropriated for the Fund shall remain available until expended.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations to Fund
children.label: b Authorization of appropriations to Fund

children.text: the amount collected during the preceding fiscal year by the Federal Government pursuant to the liability of individuals under section 254 of this title for the breach of contracts entered into under section 254 or 254–1 of this title;oll
the amount by which grants under have, for such preceding fiscal year, been reduced under subsection (g)(2)(B) of such section; andsection 254q–1 of this title

the aggregate of the amount of interest accruing during the preceding fiscal year on obligations held in the Fund pursuant to subsection (d) and the amount of proceeds from the sale or redemption of such obligations during such fiscal year.

children.label: A
children.text: to which a Corps member has been assigned under ; andsection 254f of this title

children.label: B
children.text: that has a need for a health professional to provide primary health services as a result of the Corps member having breached the contract entered into under section 254 or 254–1 of this title by the individual.ll

children.heading: Purpose of payments
children.label: 2 Purpose of payments
children.text: An entity receiving payments pursuant to paragraph (1) may expend the payments to recruit and employ a health professional to provide primary health services to patients of the entity, or to enter into a contract with such a professional to provide the services to the patients.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury shall invest such amounts of the Fund as such Secretary determines are not required to meet current withdrawals from the Fund. Such investments may be made only in interest-bearing obligations of the United States. For such purpose, such obligations may be acquired on original issue at the issue price, or by purchase of outstanding obligations at the market price.

children.heading: Sale of obligations
children.label: 2 Sale of obligations
children.text: Any obligation acquired by the Fund may be sold by the Secretary of the Treasury at the market price.
